title: parageum radiatum
intro: Parageum radiatum, also known as the 'Radiate Bur-marigold', is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Parageum radiatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
